summary: Tested and verified bug fix: Accountant was not receiving material/labour request approvals. The status transition flow is now fixed: planning_approved/procurement_approved → pending_accounts_approval. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI verified - Accountant Approvals page correctly shows pending labour requests with Approve button.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI verified - Approvals tab, Labour tab with pending requests, Approve button visible)

seed_data_creation: Test requests created with prefix TEST_ for Cement materials and Mason/Plumber labour types
context_for_next_testing_agent: The accountant approval flow bug has been fixed and verified. Key status transitions: (1) Material with auto-PO: planning approves → status becomes 'pending_accounts_approval'. (2) Labour: planning approves → status becomes 'pending_accounts_approval'. (3) Accountant endpoints include both new and old statuses for backwards compatibility.

material_flow_with_auto_po.step2: Planning approves (with vendor match) → auto_po=true, status='pending_accounts_approval'

backwards_compatibility.description: Accountant endpoints query both 'pending_accounts_approval' AND legacy statuses ('procurement_approved' for materials, 'planning_approved' for labour)

frontend_verification.description: AccountantModule Approvals page shows Labour (1) with pending request, Approve button visible
